title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
